listings.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
listings.description: Build and scale enterprise applications across the stack. You'll work with React, Node.js, and cloud-native architecture to deliver production-grade solutions for Fortune 500 clients.
responsibilities: Design and implement scalable web applications end-to-end
Collaborate with product and design teams to define technical solutions
Lead code reviews and mentor junior engineers
Contribute to architecture decisions and technical strategy
Own features from concept to production deployment
requirements: 5+ years of professional software development experience
Strong proficiency in TypeScript, React, and Node.js
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Solid understanding of system design and distributed systems
Excellent communication and collaboration skills
niceToHave: Experience with Kubernetes and containerized deployments
Background in enterprise or consulting environments

listings.title: Cloud Solutions Architect
listings.description: Design and lead cloud migration strategies for Fortune 500 clients. You'll be the technical authority on complex transformation programs.
responsibilities: Lead cloud architecture design for enterprise clients
Conduct technical discovery and assessment workshops
Create migration roadmaps and reference architectures
Guide implementation teams through complex cloud migrations
Present technical strategies to C-level stakeholders
requirements: 8+ years in software architecture or cloud engineering
Deep expertise in AWS or Azure (certifications preferred)
Experience leading large-scale migration programs
Strong client-facing communication skills
Track record of designing systems that serve 100K+ users
niceToHave: Background in Big Four or management consulting
Published thought leadership on cloud architecture

listings.title: Machine Learning Engineer
listings.description: Build production machine learning systems for enterprise clients. You'll take models from research to production, building robust ML pipelines that scale.
responsibilities: Design and implement end-to-end ML pipelines
Build feature engineering and model training infrastructure
Deploy and monitor ML models in production environments
Collaborate with data scientists to productionize research
Optimize model performance and inference latency
requirements: 4+ years in machine learning engineering
Strong Python skills with PyTorch or TensorFlow
Experience with MLOps tools (MLflow, Kubeflow, SageMaker)
Solid understanding of distributed computing
Experience deploying models to production at scale
niceToHave: Experience with LLMs and generative AI
Background in NLP or computer vision
Contributions to ML open source projects

listings.title: Technical Recruiter — Engineering
listings.description: Source and recruit senior engineers for both internal teams and client placements.
responsibilities: Source and engage passive engineering candidates
Conduct technical phone screens and evaluate candidates
Partner with engineering leaders on hiring strategy
Manage full-cycle recruiting for multiple roles simultaneously
Build and maintain a pipeline of top engineering talent
requirements: 3+ years of technical recruiting experience
Ability to evaluate technical skills and system design thinking
Experience with ATS platforms and sourcing tools
Track record of hiring senior+ engineers
Excellent communication and candidate experience skills
niceToHave: Previous software engineering or CS background
Familiarity with international hiring and compliance

listings.title: DevOps / Platform Engineer
listings.description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes clusters, and infrastructure-as-code for enterprise client projects.
responsibilities: Design and implement CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and GitLab CI
Manage Kubernetes clusters and container orchestration
Build and maintain infrastructure-as-code with Terraform
Implement monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions
Support engineering teams with developer experience tooling
requirements: 4+ years of DevOps or platform engineering experience
Strong Kubernetes and Docker expertise
Proficiency with Terraform or Pulumi
Experience with major cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP)
Understanding of networking, security, and compliance
